title: Chess Arena Pro
description: Premium chess platform with Stockfish analysis, online multiplayer, and puzzle modes.
Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A fast-paced, addictive slide puzzle.

title: Retro Snake
description: The classic Nokia-style snake game. Eat food, grow longer, don't hit the walls.

title: Hextris
description: Fast paced puzzle game inspired by Tetris. Rotate the hexagon to match blocks.

title: Sudoku
description: Classic 9x9 number puzzle. Fill every row, column, and 3x3 box with digits 1-9.

title: Mahjong Solitaire
description: Match pairs of tiles to clear the board in this classic tile-matching game.

title: Block Blast
description: Place blocks on the grid and clear rows and columns to score big.

title: Match 3 Mania
description: Swap gems to match 3 or more in a row. Create combos for massive chain reactions.

title: Water Sort Puzzle
description: Sort colored water into matching tubes. Sounds easy? Think again!

title: Jigsaw Puzzle
description: Drag and drop pieces to complete beautiful pictures.

title: Unblock Me
description: Slide blocks to free the red block. Hundreds of levels from easy to expert.

title: Chess
description: The king of strategy games. Play against the computer or a friend.

title: Checkers
description: Jump and capture your opponent's pieces. King your checkers to dominate.

title: Minesweeper
description: The legendary Windows classic. Uncover tiles without hitting a mine.

title: Nonogram
description: Solve picture puzzles using number clues. Reveal pixel art masterpieces.

title: Daily Crossword
description: Classic crossword puzzles with clues. New puzzle available daily.

title: Pac-Man
description: Eat all the dots, avoid the ghosts, and grab the power pellets!

title: Breakout
description: Bounce the ball to break all the bricks. Classic arcade action.

title: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from waves of descending aliens. The OG shoot-em-up.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to fly through the pipes. Deceptively simple, maddeningly difficult.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim, shoot, and pop matching bubbles before they reach the bottom.

title: Doodle Jump
description: Jump higher and higher on platforms. Avoid enemies and collect power-ups.

title: Crossy Road
description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Dodge traffic and hop your way to glory.

title: Tetris Classic
description: The legendary falling-blocks puzzle. Clear lines before they stack up.

title: Drift Boss
description: Drift around corners at high speed. One touch to steer — time it perfectly.

title: Moto X3M
description: Perform insane stunts on your motorcycle across 30+ obstacle-filled levels.

title: Highway Rider
description: Weave through highway traffic at breakneck speed. How far can you go?

title: Rally Point
description: Off-road rally racing through mud, snow, and desert. Beat the clock!

title: Traffic Racer
description: Dodge traffic, earn coins, and unlock new vehicles in this endless racer.

title: Speed Racer
description: Pure speed. No brakes. Just you, the track, and adrenaline.

title: Parking Fury
description: Park your car without scratching it. Increasingly tight spots await.

title: Hill Climb Driver
description: Drive uphill without flipping. Collect coins, upgrade your ride.

title: Truck Driver
description: Deliver cargo across rugged terrain. Don't spill the load!

title: Stickman Fighter
description: Epic stickman combat. Punch, kick, and combo your way to victory.

title: Zombie Survival
description: Survive waves of zombies. Craft weapons, build barricades, stay alive.

title: Ninja Clash
description: Slash, dash, and throw shurikens in this fast-paced ninja action game.

title: Stick War
description: Command your stickman army. Mine gold, train units, and conquer enemy bases.

title: Bullet Force
description: Intense multiplayer FPS. Team deathmatch, free-for-all, and more.

title: Fireboy & Watergirl
description: Work together to solve puzzles in the Forest Temple. One keyboard, two players!

title: Bob the Robber
description: Sneak past guards, hack security, and steal treasures in this stealth game.

title: Vex
description: Hardcore platformer with wall jumps, slides, and deadly traps.

title: Temple Escape
description: Run through ancient temples, dodge traps, and collect artifacts.

title: Geometry Dash Clone
description: Jump and fly through rhythm-based levels. One mistake and you restart!

title: Red Ball
description: Roll and jump through colorful levels. Squash the square enemies!

title: Run 3
description: Run through space tunnels that twist and turn. Don't fall into the void!

title: OvO
description: Speedrun-style platformer with wall jumps, slides, and momentum tricks.

title: Stickman Parkour
description: Flip, jump, and wall-run through urban obstacle courses.

title: Basketball Stars
description: Shoot hoops, steal the ball, and slam dunk your way to championship.

title: Soccer Skills
description: 1v1 street soccer. Dribble past your opponent and score the winning goal.

title: Penalty Kick Online
description: Aim your shot and beat the goalkeeper. Quick-fire penalty shootout.

title: Bowling
description: Line up your shot and knock down all the pins. Strike!

title: Solitaire
description: The timeless classic. Stack cards in alternating colors, build foundation piles.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Arrange all cards in suit order. The ultimate patience challenge.

title: FreeCell
description: Use free cells strategically to move all cards to the foundation.

title: Blackjack
description: Hit or stand? Get as close to 21 as possible without going bust.

title: Memory Cards
description: Flip cards and find matching pairs. Train your memory!

title: Ludo
description: Classic board game. Roll the dice and race your tokens home.

title: Connect Four
description: Drop your disc to connect 4 in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.

title: Tic Tac Toe
description: X or O? Get three in a row to win this simple but strategic game.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: Click the cookie. Buy upgrades. Click more cookies. It never ends.

title: Idle Miner
description: Dig deep, hire miners, and build your mining empire.

title: Fruit Ninja
description: Slice flying fruits with your blade. Don't hit the bombs!

title: Stack
description: Stack blocks as high as you can. Time your taps perfectly!

title: Helix Jump
description: Bounce the ball down the helix tower. Smash through platforms, avoid the red ones.

title: Piano Tiles
description: Tap the black tiles to play the melody. Don't miss a beat!

title: Friday Night Funkin'
description: Rap battle your way through opponents. Hit the arrows in time with the beat!

title: Beat Jumper
description: Jump and bounce on tiles to the rhythm of the music.

title: Asteroids
description: Blast asteroids in deep space. The classic Atari arcade experience.

title: Space Shooter
description: Defend the galaxy from alien ships. Collect power-ups and blast away.

title: Galaxy Attack
description: Pilot your starship through waves of alien formations. Boss battles await!

title: Tower Defense
description: Build towers along the path. Upgrade them. Defeat every wave of enemies.

title: Age of War
description: Evolve through the ages. Build armies from cavemen to futuristic soldiers.

title: Hex Empire
description: Turn-based strategy on a hex grid. Conquer all territories to win.

title: Minecraft Classic
description: Build anything you can imagine in the original block-building sandbox.

title: Sand Game
description: Drop sand, water, fire, and other elements to create chain reactions.

title: Pixel Painter
description: Create pixel art masterpieces on a grid canvas. Export your creations!

title: Slendrina
description: Explore a haunted cellar. Find 8 pages. Don't look behind you.

title: Horror Maze
description: Navigate a pitch-black maze with only a flashlight. Something is following you.

title: Idle Farm
description: Grow crops, raise animals, and expand your farm. Runs even while you're away!

description: Zone residential, commercial, and industrial areas. Manage traffic and taxes.

title: Restaurant Tycoon
description: Cook, serve, and manage your restaurant. Keep customers happy and tips flowing.
